title: Craftable Hostile Mob Drops
description: Recipes for the mob drops you can't get in peaceful.
body:
![Craftable Hostile Mob Drops: Bringing the End Home](https://i.postimg.cc/hjVBzkPY/CHMD_logo.png)
This pack aims to add balanced ways of obtaining hostile mob drops for peaceful players. If the drop can be obtained through other means such as villager trades, it will not be included.

For now, it does include items that can be obtained as junk items while fishing.
# Current Included Drops - Blaze Rod - Bone - Ghast Tear - Gunpowder - Nether Star - Froglights - Phantom Membrane - Prismarine Crystal - Prismarine Shard - Rotten Flesh - Slime Ball - Spider Eye - Totem Of Undying - Trident - Dragon egg - Dragon's breath - Elytra - Shulker shell ## Future Plans - Future update mob drops - Music discs / trims not found naturally - Backporting # Recipes
1.20-1.20.1 ## Shaped Crafting ![4 Blaze Rod: 1 bamboo, 2 glowstone dust](https://i.postimg.cc/28YD3MXM/blaze-rod.png) ![1 Bone: 3 bonemeal](https://i.postimg.cc/C5Gpmsdc/bone.png) ![8 Gunpowder: 1 flint and steel, 8 wheat](https://i.postimg.cc/fR2n2LTQ/gunpowder.png) ![1 Nether Star: 4 ghast tears, 4 echo shards, 1 diamond block](https://i.postimg.cc/bNRjng7J/nether-star.png) ![4 Phantom Membrane: 1 leather, 4 feathers](https://i.postimg.cc/LsGdSb1y/phantom-membrane.png) ![4 Slime Ball: 2 wheat, 2 green dye, 1 bottle of honey](https://i.postimg.cc/j2w0PjZR/slimeball.png) ![1 Totem of Undying: 3 gold nuggets, 2 emeralds, 1 gold ingot, 1 gold block](https://i.postimg.cc/dtwbJdhK/totem-of-undying.png) ![1 Trident: 3 prismarine shards, 2 echo shards](https://i.postimg.cc/pXCgrTj5/trident.png) ![1 Dragon Egg: 4 crying obsidian, 4 dragon's breath, 1 end crystal](https://i.postimg.cc/4NN6VJMy/dragon-egg.png) ![1 Bottle of Dragon's Breath: 1 glass bottle, 1 crying obsidian, 2 magenta dye, 1 bucket of water](https://i.postimg.cc/sfJPMBn5/dragons-breath.png) ![1 Elytra: 2 fire chargers, 1 diamond, 2 phantom membrane, 1 iron ingot, 2 rockets](https://i.postimg.cc/9FFdZWSM/elytra.png) ![1 Shulker Shell: 2 amethyst shards, 3 scutes](https://i.postimg.cc/L4VkJqyL/shulker-shell.png) ## Shapeless Crafting ![1 Ochre Froglight: 1 sea lantern, 1 yellow dye](https://i.postimg.cc/3rmh8Y92/ochre-froglight.png) ![1 Pearlescent Froglight: 1 sea lantern, 1 pink dye](https://i.postimg.cc/QdxZJ5Dq/pearlescent-froglight.png) ![Verdant Froglight: 1 sea lantern, 1 lime dye](https://i.postimg.cc/tR300DC5/verdant-froglight.png) ![3 Prismarine Crystal: 1 glow ink sac, 1 light blue dye, 1 amethyst cluster](https://i.postimg.cc/jjDVGbLw/prismarine-crystal.png) ![2 Prismarine Shard: 1 glow ink sac, 1 light blue dye, 1 amethyst shard](https://i.postimg.cc/prY3DV17/prismarine-shard.png) ![8 Spider Eye: 1 ender eye, 1 string](https://i.postimg.cc/RFtkZL1v/spider-eye.png) ## Smelting ![1 Rotten flesh: 1 leather](https://i.postimg.cc/tJHLZnDW/rotten-flesh.png)
